text:
The Egyptian Olympic football teamwill face its French counterpart on Monday in the semi-finals of the football competitions at the 33rd edition of the Olympic Games, which kicked off on July 26 and ends on August 11.

The official account of the Algerian terrestrial channel announced on Facebook that the match will be broadcast on the free and open Youth channel (TV6) via the NileSat satellite.



Frequency of the Algerian terrestrial channel via Nilesat

To download the open Algerian terrestrial channel, go to settings, then satellite data, choose the channel name, then write the frequency and the rest of the data, and write the channel code 110000110000000 in the biss box.

The match will also be broadcast on the Moroccan Sports Channel 1.



The date of Egypt and France match in the Paris Olympics will be on Monday, August 5, at exactly 10:00 PM Cairo time.

The Parc Olympique Lyonnais stadium will host Egypt and France match in the semi-final football competitions in the current Paris Olympics.



Egypt Olympic team’s formation against France

Edited translation from Al-Masry Al-Youm
title: Channels broadcasting the Egypt vs. France match at Paris Olympics - Egypt Independent
author: Al-Masry Al-Youm
